# Ritera Publishing
> Tamil Nadu-based self-publishing platform

Ritera Publishing helps authors publish their books end-to-end with full royalty retention.

## Services
- Manuscript editing
- Book cover design
- Interior formatting
- ISBN registration
- Global distribution (Amazon, Flipkart, and more)

## Contact
- Website: https://riterapublishing.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ritera_publishing
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/ritera-publishing
